items.title: Residents in eastern Congo cling to hope as a new Ebola treatment trial begins
items.desc: Residents at the epicenter of Congo’s Ebola outbreak are pinning their hopes on experimental treatments after researchers began a highly anticipated study in early July of two possible Ebola treatments in hopes of fighting the still-growing outbreak.
